text:
miwi        2012-05-18 04:40:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    misc                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    misc/xdg-menu        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  XDG-Menu is a ROX panel applet that displays applications menu button.
  Menu is builds to fit the XDG Menu Specification published by freedesktop.org.
  
  WWW: http://xdg-menu.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/167693
  Submitted by:   nemysis@gmx.ch
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1010    +1 -0      ports/misc/Makefile
  1.1       +55 -0     ports/misc/xdg-menu/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/misc/xdg-menu/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/misc/xdg-menu/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/misc/xdg-menu/pkg-plist (new)
